description_long: This is a modern office building with a sleek, curved rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The facade is dominated by large, evenly spaced windows set within a grid of white or light gray framing, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The building sits on a broad, flat base or plinth, which may serve as a plaza or entryway. The corners of the structure are rounded, softening the overall geometry and enhancing its modernist aesthetic. The lower level features a slightly recessed area, possibly indicating a lobby or main entrance, with transparent glass panels. The overall design emphasizes horizontal lines and transparency, typical of contemporary commercial architecture.
description: A sleek, modern office building with a curved rectangular shape, large grid windows, and a flat roof. Its facade features rounded corners and a prominent glass entry area.
description_view_0: The building is seen from the long side, highlighting the horizontal grid of windows and the rounded corner on the left.
description_view_1: A short end view, showing the curved facade and the depth of the building, with the main entrance area visible at the base.
description_view_2: The opposite long side, similar to view 0, but with the rounded corner now on the right and the window grid clearly visible.
description_view_3: The other short end, mirroring view 1, with the curved facade and recessed lower level apparent.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular horizontal bands of rectangular windows set in a grid, evenly spaced across all facades.
